zh.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham是James Heyham和Agnes的女兒，出生。她和John Richardson至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham是James Heyham和Agnes的女儿，出生。她和John Richardson至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Heyham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Henham (Essex, Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Audry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered form of the Old English girl's name Æðelþryð, derived from æðel ‘noble’ + þryð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 6th-century saint (normally known by the Latinized form of her name, Etheldreda), who was a particular favourite in the Middle Ages. According to tradition she died from a tumour of the neck, which she bore stoically as a divine punishment for her youthful delight in fine necklaces. The name went into a decline at the end of the Middle Ages, when it came to be considered vulgar, being associated with tawdry, that is, lace and other goods sold at fairs held in her name (the word deriving from a misdivision of Saint Audrey). Shakespeare bestowed it on Touchstone's comic sweetheart in As You Like It. In the 20th century, such associations largely forgotten, the name was revived, partly due in the 1950s and 60s to the popularity of the actress Audrey Hepburn ( 1929–93 ).

en.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham was born as the daughter of James Heyham and Agnes. She had at least 1 son with John Richardson.

fr.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham est née, fille de James Heyham et Agnes. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Richardson.

de.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham wurde, als Tochter von James Heyham und Agnes geboren. Sie hatte mit John Richardson mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham è nata il come figlia di James Heyham e Agnes. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John Richardson.

ja.lifeSummary: Audry HeyhamはJames HeyhamとAgnesの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Richardsonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham(은)는 James Heyham(와)과 Agnes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Richardson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham nasceu filha de James Heyham e Agnes. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John Richardson.

ru.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham родилась. Её родителей звали James Heyham и Agnes. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Richardson.

es.lifeSummary: Audry Heyham nació como hija de James Heyham y Agnes. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John Richardson.
